taskDescription: Add a Context Atlas visualization layer to the BCOS dashboard — three lenses (Ownership Map, Relationship Graph, Lifecycle Flow) over docs/ frontmatter semantics, plus CLEAR-compliance, skill/agent-impact, freshness-volatility, and upstream-drift overlays. Static-first (HTML+CSS treemap, Mermaid graph, CSS-grid Kanban) with a single shared ingestion module reused by file_health.py.

userApproval.condition: Re-read latest dashboard files before starting Phase 1 — parallel session made refinements during planning.

preImplementationChecklist: DONE — Re-read run.py, single_repo.py for unstaged changes
DONE — Confirmed bcos_sync wired into cockpit via _collect_bcos_framework_block()
DONE — Identified new port_assign.py (relevant to deferred OD-4 only)
DONE — No conflicts with plan; v1 phases unchanged

preImplementationFindings.upstreamBehind: 4 commits (gitignore profile work — unrelated to dashboard)
newAPIsAvailable: bcos_sync.collect_freshness() — already feeding cockpit; Atlas Phase 5 will consume the same
port_assign.assign_port() — per-repo stable port registry (relevant to deferred OD-4)

reusableComponents: .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/file_health.py — frontmatter parser + doc iterator (extract to shared module)

designDecisions.scenario: AGENTING (no docs/ writes; all changes inside .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/)
designDecisions.ingestion: Shared module atlas_ingest.py; file_health.py refactored to import from it. Single pass per TTL.
designDecisions.caching: Existing Panel TTL framework (300s for ownership/relationships, 600s for compliance overlay). No new cron.
designDecisions.ia: New top-level page /atlas with 3 lens-tabs (Ownership / Lifecycle / Relationships). Cockpit gets a small teaser tile.

rendering.ownershipMap: HTML+CSS squarified treemap (no SVG generator dep)
rendering.lifecycleFlow: CSS Grid Kanban with age indicators
rendering.skillHalo: CSS overlay on hover (computed client-side from atlas.json)
rendering.driftOverlay: Color filter on framework-file tiles, sourced from bcos_sync upstream cache

rejectedAlternatives: D3/Cytoscape interactive — adds JS build step; defer until static reaches its limit
Standalone cron-generated atlas.json — adds another job to schedule-config; TTL panel cache is simpler
Server-side SVG via matplotlib/svgwrite — adds Python dep; HTML+CSS treemap is sufficient
Full-text similarity edges in graph — too noisy; only render frontmatter-declared edges so the graph stays trustworthy

phases: Phase 1: Shared ingestion module (atlas_ingest.py) — refactor + extend
Phase 2: Ownership Map (treemap + freshness + duplication warnings)
Phase 3: Lifecycle Flow (Kanban + age + promote/archive actions)
Phase 4: Relationship Graph (Mermaid from frontmatter relationships)
Phase 5: Compliance + Drift overlays (CLEAR ring + upstream-drift coloring)
Phase 6: Skill/agent impact halo (parse skill frontmatter)
Phase 7: FIXED END — integration audit, ecosystem state, learnings capture

openDecisions.question: Which frontmatter key is the canonical 'domain' for Ownership Map regions — `cluster`, `DOMAIN`, or `EXCLUSIVELY_OWNS`?
openDecisions.approach: Inspect 5-10 real docs, default to `cluster` if present (it's in REQUIRED_FIELDS), fall back to inferred from folder.

openDecisions.question: What YAML shape does the `relationships` field take in real docs?
openDecisions.approach: Grep current docs for `relationships:`; lock the parser to whatever shape exists; document in atlas_ingest.py.

openDecisions.question: How is per-domain volatility (expected-cadence) declared?
openDecisions.approach: Default 90 days; opt-in override via a small registry file `.claude/quality/atlas-domains.json` (no docs/ change).

openDecisions.question: Multi-repo umbrella aggregation
openDecisions.approach: Flag as follow-up after single-repo Atlas ships and we know the data shape.

tasks.content: Create atlas_ingest.py with _iter_docs/_parse_frontmatter extracted from file_health.py (preserve existing behavior)
tasks.activeForm: Creating atlas_ingest.py with shared parser primitives

tasks.content: Inspect 5-10 real docs to confirm domain key; codify into atlas_ingest.domain_of(doc)
tasks.activeForm: Confirming domain key from real docs

tasks.content: Add atlas_ingest.build_atlas() — returns {docs, domains, lifecycle_buckets, relationships, generated_at} dict
Refactor file_health.py to import iterator + parser from atlas_ingest (no behavior change)
tasks.activeForm: Refactoring file_health.py to consume shared module

tasks.content: Add /api/atlas debug endpoint serving raw atlas.json for inspection
Implement squarified treemap algorithm in atlas_layout.py (pure stdlib)
Add collect_atlas_ownership() collector — sizes from content length, colors from freshness
Detect duplication: docs whose EXCLUSIVELY_OWNS set overlaps another doc's; surface as red badges
Add /atlas page shell to dashboard.html with lens-tab nav (Ownership active by default)
Render ownership treemap in dashboard.js (HTML+CSS tiles, click → file-detail drawer)
Style treemap in dashboard.css — domain regions, freshness ramp (green/amber/red), duplication badge
Add cockpit teaser tile linking to /atlas (shows total docs + N stale)
Add collect_atlas_lifecycle() — buckets _inbox/_planned/docs/_archive with age + age-stuck flags (>14d in inbox)
Render Kanban view (CSS Grid, 4 columns, cards sorted by age)
Add POST /api/atlas/promote and POST /api/atlas/archive (move file between folders, update last-updated)
Wire promote/archive buttons in Kanban cards with optimistic UI + cache invalidation
Grep real docs for relationships field; lock YAML shape; document in atlas_ingest.py
Extend atlas_ingest to parse relationships into edges {from, to, kind}
Add collect_atlas_relationships() collector — emits Mermaid graph source
Render Mermaid via CDN-pinned client-side script (or vendor minified copy if offline-only)
Surface orphan docs (no incoming/outgoing edges) in a side panel
Define CLEAR-dimension fields per doc (probably from existing context-audit logic) — populate atlas_ingest output
Add .claude/quality/atlas-domains.json registry (cadence_days per domain; default 90)
Render CLEAR compliance ring (CSS conic-gradient) overlaid on each domain in Ownership Map
Color framework files (docs/_bcos-framework/**) by upstream-drift state from bcos_sync cache
Switch freshness coloring from absolute-age to volatility-relative (age vs domain.cadence_days)
Parse .claude/skills/*/SKILL.md frontmatter for read/write path patterns
Build doc->skills index in atlas_ingest output
Render hover-halo on doc tiles showing impacting skills (CSS-only popover)
Run python .claude/scripts/analyze_integration.py --staged and resolve any stale references
Update .claude/quality/ecosystem/state.json with new modules + dashboard surface area
Capture learnings via ecosystem-manager skill (treemap algorithm choice, Mermaid trade-offs, frontmatter schema gaps surfaced)
Update .claude/scripts/bcos-dashboard/README.md — Atlas section + roadmap update
Run doc-lint on touched README/files; verify cross-refs in CLAUDE.md still resolve

filesUntouched: docs/** (read-only; no docs are modified by this work)
Other skills (no skill frontmatter changes; new dashboard module is internal)
